name: Bug report
about: A workflow or script isn't behaving as documented
labels: bug

## What workflow / script

<!-- e.g. `code-review.yml`, `scripts/pilot-report.js`, `examples/log-watch-detector-template.js` -->

## What you expected

<!-- One sentence. What should have happened? -->

## What actually happened

<!-- One sentence. What did happen? -->

## Reproduction

<!-- Either:
     - A link to a public Actions run that shows the failure (preferred), or
     - The exact steps you took (which event triggered the workflow, what env was configured, etc.)
-->

## Environment

- **Auth mode:** Bedrock OIDC / Anthropic API
- **Model IDs:** (whatever you configured for the failing workflow)
- **AWS region** (if Bedrock):
- **`gh` CLI version** (if reproducing a script locally):

## Anything else

<!-- Logs, screenshots, configuration snippets. The more concrete, the faster a fix lands. -->
